title: thymus striatus var. atticus
intro: Thymus striatus var. atticus, also known as the mountain thyme, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the thyme family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Thymus striatus var. atticus can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
